text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the Takarazuka Kinen, Winning
Ticket enthusiastically tells me that she'll make it
an exciting race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just before it begins, she tells Biwa Hayahide how
she hopes to run a great race that will wow the
audience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though Hayahide senses something off about
those words, she also promises to give it her all.
And with that, they prepare to face off.
